title: Bioinformatics Analyst
description: Boston Scientific develops innovative medical devices improving patient outcomes across cardiovascular, oncology, and neuromodulation. You'll analyze biological data supporting device development and clinical trials.
responsibilities: Analyze genomic and clinical data to support product development
Manage scientific databases and data curation
Collaborate with research scientists on computational analyses
Document methods and create analysis reports
Support regulatory submissions for medical devices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of bioinformatics or computational biology experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
